production_pool_constraints: Do not modify llama.cpp GGUF worker manifest.
Do not write GGUF model cache or production model weights.
Do not route unattended daemon prompts to MLX until a separate gate exists.
Always recheck GGUF pool health after MLX smoke or teardown.

stages.goal: Prove MLX runtime/toolchain/port/GGUF baseline/resource headroom are ready before any download or process start.
candidate_commands: authorized owner flow verifies mlx_lm.server, Python/venv, experiment port, GGUF daemon freshness, memory headroom
stages.pass_condition: All required preflight_items pass and GGUF daemon baseline remains stale=false ledger_lag=0 gate_failures=0.
rollback_on_failure: Do not download models.
Do not start MLX runtime.
Record failed preflight item and keep GGUF pool unchanged.

stages.goal: Download candidate MLX model into an isolated experiment cache and record hash/size metadata.
stages.pass_condition: Files are downloaded only to the MLX experiment cache, hashes are recorded, and disk headroom remains green.
rollback_on_failure: Do not modify GGUF cache.
Delete only the failed isolated experiment cache if authorized.
Record partial download paths before cleanup.

stages.goal: Start one MLX experiment slot on a non-production port.
stages.pass_condition: Exactly one MLX process listens on the experiment port, no GGUF worker port changes, and GGUF daemon remains fresh.
rollback_on_failure: Stop only the MLX experiment process if it started.
Do not stop llama.cpp GGUF workers.
Recheck GGUF pool health and daemon report freshness.

stages.goal: Send one bounded smoke prompt to the MLX experiment slot.
stages.pass_condition: Smoke returns a valid response under token/time limits and is not routed through unattended daemon.
rollback_on_failure: Do not retry unbounded prompts.
Capture MLX logs and resource sample.
Stop MLX experiment process if authorized.

stages.goal: Record resource and GGUF health after the MLX smoke.
candidate_commands: read GGUF daemon status and status-with-model-cache.json
stages.pass_condition: Memory pressure remains green, no swap pressure regression, GGUF workers remain 6/6 healthy and Metal.
rollback_on_failure: Mark MLX candidate unsafe for residency.
Stop MLX experiment process if authorized.
Keep GGUF pool unchanged and recheck daemon freshness.

stages.goal: Decide whether to tear down the MLX slot or keep it as an explicitly experimental non-production service.
candidate_commands: or record explicit keep-alive owner, port, PID, resource limits, and monitoring
stages.pass_condition: Either no MLX process remains, or a documented experimental owner/monitoring plan exists.
rollback_on_failure: Prefer teardown if ownership/monitoring is unclear.
Do not attach experiment slot to Web Lab/Forge/CLI production routing.
Record final PID/port state.

stages.goal: Confirm GGUF production pool and daemon remained healthy after the MLX experiment.
stages.pass_condition: GGUF pool remains 6/6 healthy, all Metal, model cache 5/5 ok, daemon stale=false ledger_lag=0 gate_failures=0.
rollback_on_failure: Mark experiment as production-impacting.
Do not run further MLX candidates.
Escalate to main window for GGUF recovery decision.

minimum_authorized_first_command_boundar.description: The first execution after authorization should be a read-only preflight inventory, not a download, process start, or prompt.
